message: Live sources refreshed using nflverse season 2026. Dashboard season remains 2026. Updated local nflverse cache: players.csv, draft_picks.csv, contracts.csv, depth_charts.csv, teams.csv. Some sources were unavailable: weekly_rosters: Season must be between 2002 and 2025; player_season_stats: Failed to download https://github.com/nflverse/nflverse-data/releases/download/stats_player/stats_player_week_2026.parquet: 404 Client Error: Not Found for url: https://github.com/nflverse/nflverse-data/releases/download/stats_player/stats_player_week_2026.parquet; player_snap_counts: Season must be between 2012 and 2025; injuries: Season must be between 2009 and 2025.
